name: jira
description: Jira ticket read/write — read tickets during plan/validate, transition status and add comments during implement/deploy.

tools.name: jira_get_ticket
tools.description: Fetch a Jira ticket by key (e.g. PROJ-401). Returns summary, description, status, assignee, and acceptance criteria.

tools.name: jira_search
tools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL. Returns ticket keys, summaries, and statuses.

tools.name: jira_transition
tools.description: Move a ticket through workflow states (e.g. To Do → In Progress → In Review → Done).

tools.name: jira_add_comment
tools.description: Post a comment to a Jira ticket. Use to surface PR URLs, validator reports, and blockers.

tools.name: jira_add_label
tools.description: Add a label to a ticket. Use to flag tickets that touched a particular subsystem (e.g. 'security-review-required').

envVars.name: JIRA_HOST
envVars.description: Atlassian Cloud host, e.g. 'yourorg.atlassian.net'. No scheme, no trailing slash.

envVars.name: JIRA_EMAIL
envVars.description: Email of the service account that owns the API token.

envVars.name: JIRA_TOKEN
envVars.description: API token from id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens. NEVER commit.
